case_title: CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU, INC. VS. FELVITA M GOTGOTAO et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOTGOTAO, FELVITA M
